<features>
- petal color: orange
- petal shape: pointed, elongated, crane-like
- additional colors: blue/purple accents
- background: black
</features>
<kb>
- IF [petal color = orange AND petal shape = pointed/elongated AND additional colors = blue/purple] THEN [7]
- IF [petal color = pink/white AND petal shape = ruffled] THEN [29]
- IF [petal color = white/purple AND petal shape = bell-shaped/hooded] THEN [8]
- IF [petal color = orange AND petal shape = many small rounded petals] THEN [4]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 7 fires because the image shows orange, pointed, elongated petals with blue/purple accents, matching the pattern seen in the first example.
</rule_check>

<response>7</response>
